name: opendart-excel
description: Create verified financial statement Excel workbooks from OpenDART disclosures using the bundled MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Create verified OpenDART financial Excel workbooks.
interface.longDescription: OpenDART Excel bundles the OpenDART MCP server with a workflow skill for generating verified financial statement Excel workbooks from DART disclosures.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create an OpenDART financial statement Excel workbook.
